item.title: Day 1 of making my BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe Cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.youtube.com/@yuzupyon Hi everyone I am back with a new crafting project! After I did my chainmail Irulan cosplay, I kept thinking about the next project I should do, and decided to go for this one! I hope you like it, if you're interested to see more of my process videos please check out my Youtube Channel, and for final result pics I post them on my https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Hopefully I can finish this project in time for Anime Expo this year! :) Wishing you abgreat day, YuzuPyon Note : Please PAUSE TO READ TEXT I know it's pretty fast but the text is only optional for people who want more infos, will make long form video tutorials on my YT channel in the future, in the meantime social media platforms (and Imgur alike) limit videos to 60 seconds, it is what it is.
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Just Singing To The Birds.
item.description: Hi Imgurian, thank you for the Entertaining Accolade! Did you know that Bob Smith was the first openly gay comedian to appear on The Tonight Show and the first openly gay comedian to have a HBO comedy half hour? Now you do!✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Smith_(comedian) Oh Imgurian, can I treat you to a trivia tidbit? As a way to say thank you for the awesome Entertaining Accolade. Suzanne Westenhoefer was the first openly lesbian comic on television. On the Sally Jesse Raphael show, entitled 'Breaking the Lesbian Stereotype'. She also was the first gay comic on Late Night With David Letterman. Her HBO half hour special was nominated for a cable Ace Award.✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suzanne_Westenhoefer Well hello Imgurian! Thank you for such a gracious Accolade! In turn I give you this: Pixar's had it's first openly gay lead in the short, 'Out', in 2020. It was about a man struggling to come out, and ends up switching bodies with his dog. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Out_(2020_film)✨ Omg Imgurian! Sorry, I had to do the sleep thing, but I see you! Thank you for the Accolade but I must insist that you are simply the best! And for that you get TRIVIA! One of the first known films to portray gay men was called, 'Different From Others'. A German film shot in 1919, it was one of the first films to also portray gay men in a sympathetic/positive light. ✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Different_from_the_Others
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: Streamer tried to "prank" a guy in a gym and it backfired
item.dc:creator: unknownkooli

item.title: Roommates Mini-Dump
item.description:
I usually only do my (mini) dumps on Thursdays, but my LGBTQ+ memes folder on my PC is massive and I'm trying to sort it out, and it's Pride Month so why not?
There's so many iterations of Harley that never hook up with Ivy and that makes me sad.
Something tells me this wasn't from the original comics.
There aren't enough alien x human lesbian stories.
This is so insanely cute. I'd love to see a story like this. I'd make an attempt myself but it might feel like copying it? I dunno.
Dream wedding.
I love the designs in Monster High, never watched it though...
This is a need, not a want. https://gaybreakfast.storenvy.com/products/30378661-gayayayayea I hate to admit I haven't finished the show yet...but I love what I've seen so far.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
dude is gonna fall sometime
and the problem is?
mmm hmm
what if we kissed there?
must be at a stadium or something to need so many dryers in 1 bathroom
i hate contacts. glasses 4 life, yo
so why is a person holding one
definition of unhinged, dare i say
this dump is heavy on spider content i guess
i'm almost always pondering pizza
my apologies
yes it's a covid era meme. well i hadnt seen it and it made me laugh so yeah
gross
this dump was made on one
sweatpants or basketball shorts are my houseclothes
every time. weed has destroyed my short term memory
that's gonna do it for me... have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Returning Images To the Wild
item.description:
Get this dog a country music contract
To adventure!
Me
Let him get bevvied
Hero
"have you ever been mistaken for a man?" *Morphs into Robert Patrick* "perhaps"
Accurate
This is longer than I remember (something I've never Heard being said to me)
WOT
Friend
Captain Toby
I'm so glad Tony Iommi has patched things up with Tony Martin. Hell yes, Headless Cross reissue
You got me on my knees
Animals of Farthing Wood energy
My son, he is very sick
Read this in the voice of Laszlo Cravensworth
They'll still thump you though
I see no problem here
Redwall conflict
8)
I'd risk MY life for a bargain
Surely these also have breathing problems like pugs but you never hear anything about it
The only explanation
I need the comfy chair
Frustration
Made in a Significant Oven
Willy's Wonderland spoiler with no context (watch Willy's wonderland)
Ello
George was best beatle
You know they absolutely could gender or role swap link and Zelda and it would work
Sorry ma'am
Go F yourself
Sensible chuckle
And his massive deuces will save the environment (this is a genuine plot point)
Another sensible chuckle
Neck Oil is a nice beer that has the unfortunate side effect of smelling exactly like cat piss
Same for people who mock "is it just me or" posts
Most supermarkets are owned by incredibly wealthy people. This is morally correct
Do it
Whoa, I'm halfway there
Good advice for the husband of the gay chap from the pop group Steps
Mustelid mage
Armitage Shanks defecation scenario
Light snack
Absolute tune
<3 love that this is implied in the monster verse
I'm autistic and once got banned from a videogame discord for posting this because it made the NTs uncomfortable
Horror. But I wonder, maybe just a little milk might work...?
He is literally firing six cannons at him
Trans ally tax

item.title: It’s pride, I’m drunk, confession time!!
item.description: Front Page Edit; First time ever reaching most viral, maybe that’s a sign. Thank you so much to everyone for the overwhelming support and love. I don’t know what my next steps may or may not be but thank you to everyone who messaged offering an ear. Woohoo front page.

Imagine
Well
A m e r i c a
This basically happened when Jon Kent Superman got a boyfriend.
THE WIZARD [Guitar Solo]
The popular image of the 1950s being all perfect families and malt shops is a lie that too many people buy into.
http://discord.abbii.gay http://mastodon.abbii.gay http://tumblr.abbii.gay http://twitch.abbii.gay

item.title: 26 years ago, an IRA bomb in the red car killed 29 people in Northern Ireland. This photograph was taken moments before detonation. The man and child in the picture survived, the photographer did not.
item.dc:creator: DataStream

item.title: My wife of 25 years is divorcing me this year. I’m getting anxiety thinking about dating in my 50’s coming up. My OCD made me put these in my “Tinder Memes” album to share. Enjoy.

item.title: Bryan Blehm has already been fined by the Arizona Supreme Court
item.description: When his license is reinstated, Blehm will be on probation for one year. Blehm will also have to do five hours of additional continuing legal education in ethics and professional responsibility https://web.archive.org/web/20240607213229/https://eu.azcentral.com/story/news/politics/arizona/2024/06/07/bryan-blehm-suspended-for-60-days-for-lying-in-kari-lake-case
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: History Dump
item.description:
Tycho Brahe is underappreciated
Golems are also underappreciated
This website which gives you insults from Martin Luther is also underappreciated
I miss the weird sea shanty epidemic
This makes me sadder than the Library of Alexandria, which is a high bar
5 minutes after AI language generators: "Maybe we're just probabilistic language generators?"
I'm shockingly straight, but have sworn off guys that are really into WWII and Rome. Not sure why, but it's always a bad combination

item.title: Pride Month Continues...
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: I am so sorry Nina
item.description: We adopted her about 11 years ago for mice control. I believe she was about 15 when she died Wednesday night. I didn't even like cats and she changed my mind. The guilt is killing me. I keep trying to remind myself we gave her a great life and it was an accident but it still fucking sucks. I'm sorry Nina and I will miss and love you forever. Most Viral Edit: Thank you for all the kind words and support and thank you to those who shared their stories as well. We all love our pets despite cultural and and socioeconomic differences. Most of you helped me remember that today and I am gracious for that. Nina was adopted from living in a 2×2' cage at a shelter. We needed a mouser both inside AND outside. She preferred to spend most her time outdoors and we provided safety, love and shelter. Anyone who wants to use her memorial post to promote only indoor cat living as an excuse for her death can fuck off. I was an accident. She wasn't that kind of cat and I'm glad I gave her the life she wanted and deserved. Love you and and thank you for the support. ❤️?❤️
item.dc:creator: Snuggelapolous

item.title: Can't Sleep, Thoughts Will Eat Me aka late nite dump
item.description:
Important reiteration
Savage fear in you will rise
Come on mate he's not that bad
Come on mate they weren't that bad
Kill Phil
Priorities
I like the ending of Go West Young Meowth where they basically succeed in their evil plan to show up on stage
Canine cuisine
Looking good. I imagine she'll be just as good by the end of her next outing
Stealing this
Didn't steal this
Protect your wiener
Egyptian Pharaoh being hand fed peeled grapes energy
So handsome
Read a mfin book
Early Access is stupid (most of the time)
Dig it
Also aimed at you, asda
Whatever happened to that guy
I think he's attempting vaginal penetration while returning to earth in that space module sir
My reaction whenever Dexter got another season past 4
Anti skip technology was a lie
Never bring a knife to a battle of wits
I mean seriously an LGBT friend and I were walking last week and within minutes they were a dot in the distance
It might though
Polite reminder
Big Dave has a point
Honestly I have stolen food from large businesses that was reduced due to being at the sell by date, right before they closed, and I will do it again
Rats and humans, a mayfly December romance
Man's onto something here
Me when twiglets
I mean I'd steal that joke
Sometimes we humans are capable of great things
I both hope this is and isn't real for different reasons
I think he was sent by Mr Burns
Now this is podracing
Somerton and Tallarico: Liars extraordinaire
No but them persisting in repeating it for more than ten seconds is
I'll be Beethoven
Old but gold
HERE I AM, I'M THE MASTER OF YOUR DESTINY
Some are both
Hehehehehe
The true patriarchal agenda
The man is a treasure, though in the third panel his finger looks like a penis
Entrepreneur. Also possibly English wrestler Will Ospreay
I genuinely want to do this
Satisfaction
